title: cenchrus tribuloides
intro: Cenchrus tribuloides, commonly known as Tribulus terrestris, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Zygophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is rich in health benefits, such as reducing cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing male fertility. Tribulus terrestris is often used in herbal preparations, including capsules, tablets, and tea, which are consumed for its various health benefits, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively studied in clinical trials.
